reviews.review_description: I want my money back if you cant fix this. I WANT MY MONEY BACK.

developer_response.body: Please contact support@oculus.com to get this sorted out or a refund. You can also make sure you have the latest version of the Oculus app.

reviews.review_description: Fantastic, poetic, involving... must have game!!!

My wife who hates games put on the headgear to check it out. Thoroughly enjoyed it. I like that you can restart competed stages so you can share the experience. But after connecting all the lines on level 9 nothing. Need a hint.
Nice
This is what we should be getting more of Occlus. Not the garbage you put out each week. This is such a wonderful game. Very well designed. Great puzzles. I am waiting for Chapter 2

Beautiful game, truly enjoyable. I got stuck in level 11 however. It seems that I solved everything there is to be solved, but there is no exit to the next level. Shall I keep looking or can somebody help me please?

developer_response.body: Thanks for your nice review! If you're getting stuck you can check out this playthrough on youtube: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6ySGIb56COc&list=PLByRNVSRr_2CKf-UiD6ZharYMS2-2fhuh

reviews.review_description: I really have a good time playing this game. Beautiful graphic and great music make it enjoy to play the game. Feel like you are relax and mediate while playing game. The puzzle that not too hard or too easy but challenge enought to enjoy the game. It's worth every penny.
It's a little repetitive but still enjoyable, I am especially impressed with the graphics and atmosphere of the game. Also great now you can skip the running level if you fail.
I imagine the devs played Lands End and decided to make a game a 100x better. This game succeeds. It is fun, artistic, and engrossing. And it makes great use of the new GearVR Controller
But I agree that like in Lands End you should move around from point to point instead of teleporting from point to point.
Great immersive game with beautiful music. Only I get stick on muziki level 9. I seem to have solved everything but no exit  portal appears. Would love to play further......
Really good, it's a shame that not all games are  of this standard, shows that it can be done!
Love this game...a must buy for puzzler fans don't hesitate it's a great game

FYI! Turn 180° When Playing. I Didn't My 1st Time &Thought The Game Was Messed Up! So Much Fun, But So Much Strain On The Eyes. Make Sure To Stretch Because Turning 360°, Looking Up, Down, Left &Right. It Took A Strain On My Neck. Overall Great �
Nice puzzle solving game, very relaxing to play

If you like Dark Days or the Secret Circle you are going to love Rangi!!! It has beautiful graphics and the puzzles keep ya coming back for more!!! A must get in the Go!!!!! THANK YOU!! Hope to see more from you with my Quest 2 purchase!!!!
When i bought it was nowhere written  vr controller is required. Give me my money back!

developer_response.body: The remote controller isn't actually required. The game automatically defaults back to your headset gaze (so you won't see a wand) and touchpad for all controls if you don't have a remote controller. Please refer to the 2 text boxes at the bottom of the startup menu for a quick explanation about headset basic controls.

reviews.review_description: Reminds me a bit of Land'end but Much longer.  Interesting puzzle.  Not super difficult yet chalenging.  Spenf a few hours in this one.  Good game

The lead in levels are not too hard but things get harder and I was left puzzling on how to get past certain levels. There are also artifacts to collect so if you miss them you may find yourself going back and doing levels again just to explore and collect any items you have missed. I think it's worth every penny.

I like this a lot. The graphics are unusual and pretty. The puzzles start easy and get harder, and I found myself quickly addicted. The only thing I miss is the ability to swipe or click to turn. It’s quite hard on the neck playing on the go without a swivel chair.
